tldr_zh: OpenAI收購Ona強化AI代理能力，SpaceX上市定價$135創新高，美伊談判取得進展。
tldr_en: OpenAI acquires Ona for AI agents, SpaceX IPO priced at $135, US-Iran negotiations advance.

items.title_zh: OpenAI收購Ona擴展Codex安全雲端環境
items.title_en: OpenAI Acquires Ona to Expand Codex Cloud Capabilities
items.summary_zh: OpenAI宣布收購Ona，以建立安全且持久的雲端環境，使企業AI代理能夠跨越複雜工作流程長時間運行，擴展Codex在企業應用中的功能。此舉標誌OpenAI在AI代理基礎設施上的重要投資。
items.summary_en: OpenAI announced the acquisition of Ona to build secure, persistent cloud environments enabling long-running AI agents across enterprise workflows. This investment strengthens OpenAI's infrastructure for enterprise AI agent applications.

items.title_zh: Google DeepMind關注數百萬AI代理協作的安全風險
items.title_en: Google DeepMind Addresses Safety Risks of Millions of Interacting AI Agents
items.summary_zh: Google DeepMind資助研究以應對潛在危險，即數百萬個不同的AI代理在線上相互互動時可能造成的風險。AGI安全與對齊研究主任Rohin Shah表示，大規模無人監督且能接收其他AI指令的代理部署將帶來未知挑戰。
items.summary_en: Google DeepMind is funding research into potential dangers of mass-market deployment of millions of AI agents interacting with each other online. The company's AGI safety team is studying risks of autonomous agents operating without human oversight and following instructions from other agents.

items.title_zh: Anthropic調整Mythos級模型資料保留政策至30天
items.title_en: Anthropic Updates Data Retention Policy for Mythos Models
items.summary_zh: Anthropic針對Claude Mythos 5與Claude Fable 5等高端模型調整資料留存政策，將使用者提示詞與模型輸出保留30天，主要影響原採用零資料留存的企業客戶。此政策自2026年6月9日起生效。
items.summary_en: Anthropic modified data retention policies for Claude Mythos 5 and Claude Fable 5 models, retaining user prompts and outputs for 30 days. This change primarily affects enterprise customers previously using zero data retention options.

items.title_en: SpaceX IPO Priced at $135, Setting Record for Largest US IPO
items.summary_zh: SpaceX股票定價為每股$135，成為美國歷史上最大規模的首次公開募股。此次上市標誌著馬斯克旗下火箭公司正式進入資本市場。
items.summary_en: SpaceX officially priced its IPO shares at $135 per share, marking the largest IPO in US history. The space company's public market debut represents a significant milestone for Elon Musk's enterprise.

items.title_zh: Oracle警示安全漏洞遭駭客利用已影響百家以上公司
items.title_en: Oracle Warns of Security Vulnerability Exploited to Breach 100+ Companies
items.summary_zh: Oracle發布安全警告，一個遭駭客集團大規模利用的安全漏洞已造成百家以上公司遭入侵。Google已通知超過100個組織其伺服器可能易受攻擊。
items.summary_en: Oracle disclosed a security vulnerability being actively exploited by cybercriminals to breach over 100 companies. Google has notified more than 100 organizations about potentially vulnerable servers.

items.title_zh: 美國兩黨議員推動JAWBONE法案保護言論自由
items.title_en: Cruz and Wyden Introduce JAWBONE Act to Protect Free Speech Rights
items.summary_zh: 美國參議員克魯茲與懷登提出跨黨派JAWBONE法案，允許美國人在政府官員非法強制社交媒體、AI或廣播公司刪除內容時提起損害賠償訴訟，無論平台是否實際執行刪除。
items.summary_en: Bipartisan senators introduced the JAWBONE Act enabling Americans to sue for damages if government officials illegally coerce social media, AI, or broadcasting companies to remove content, regardless of whether platforms comply.

items.title_zh: Amazon資料中心去年耗水25億加侖引關注
items.title_en: Amazon's Data Centers Consumed 2.5 Billion Gallons of Water Last Year
items.summary_zh: Amazon首次披露全球資料中心去年耗水25億加侖。此舉正值西雅圖實施一年資料中心暫停令之際，該禁令由Amazon自身員工推動，反映業界對AI資料中心水耗與能耗的廣泛擔憂。
items.summary_en: Amazon disclosed for the first time that its global data centers consumed 2.5 billion gallons of water last year. This announcement comes as Seattle enacted a one-year data center moratorium, pushed by Amazon's own employees, amid concerns about AI infrastructure's environmental impact.

items.title_zh: 台灣NCC發布AI新聞應用指引要求全程揭露
items.title_en: Taiwan's NCC Issues AI Guidelines for News Media Requiring Full Disclosure
items.summary_zh: 台灣通訊委員會發布「廣電媒體製播新聞應用AI指引」，要求媒體必須建立人工查證機制、全程揭露AI生成內容，並禁止在重大公共事務報導中使用高度擬真的AI影音，以維護新聞公信力與閱聽眾信任。
items.summary_en: Taiwan's NCC issued AI guidelines for broadcasters requiring mandatory disclosure of AI-generated content, establishment of human verification mechanisms, and prohibition of highly realistic AI-generated video in major public affairs reporting to maintain journalistic credibility.

items.title_zh: 歐盟擬為資料中心設立能源效率門檻應對AI用電飆升
items.title_en: EU Proposes Energy Efficiency Standards for Data Centers to Combat AI Power Surge
items.summary_zh: 歐盟執委會推出新政策草案，計畫為資料中心建立最低能源效率標準，同時推動「永續標籤制度」要求企業揭露用電效率、水資源使用與再生能源占比。此政策旨在應對生成式AI與雲端服務擴張帶來的能源消耗激增。
items.summary_en: The EU Commission proposed new policies to establish minimum energy efficiency standards for data centers and introduce sustainability labeling requiring disclosure of electricity efficiency, water usage, and renewable energy percentages. These measures address energy consumption surges from generative AI expansion.

items.title_zh: 厄爾尼諾現象來臨科學家預警極端氣候威脅
items.title_en: Scientists Warn El Niño Officially Underway, Threatening Extreme Weather
items.summary_zh: 美國科學家正式宣布厄爾尼諾事件已開始，警告將導致極端氣候與更高溫度。這一全球氣候現象預計將造成熱浪、洪災、乾旱與火災等多重災害。
items.summary_en: US scientists officially announced El Niño has begun, raising concerns of extreme weather and higher temperatures. The global climate phenomenon is expected to trigger heat waves, floods, droughts, and wildfires with significant economic costs.

items.title_zh: 川普預期本週末與伊朗簽署和平協議
items.title_en: Trump Expects to Sign US-Iran Peace Agreement This Weekend
items.summary_zh: 美國總統川普表示，一項解決美伊戰爭的「偉大協議」將在未來數日內定案，並預期本週末在歐洲簽署，副總統范斯將出席。川普並臨時取消了原定對伊朗的軍事打擊。
items.summary_en: President Trump announced a "great agreement" to resolve US-Iran tensions will be finalized within days, with signing expected this weekend in Europe attended by VP Vance. Trump cancelled planned military strikes on Iran after final agreement points were approved.
